scripts.typecheck: npm run check-manifest && npm --prefix webapp run check-types
scripts.test: npm run check-manifest && npm --prefix webapp run test -- --runInBand
scripts.build:webapp: npm run check-manifest && npm --prefix webapp run build
scripts.package: npm run build:webapp && npm run package:plugin
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run package
